title: BYKITCHEN Silicone Air Fryer Liners for Ninja Dual 9.5L/Tower 9L/Instant Vortex/Salter, Large Air Fryer Accessories for Ninja AF451UK/AF400UK/EMtronics/Devology & Other 2 Drawer Air Fryer
features: LARGE SILICONE AIR FRYER LINER FOR NINJA DUAL ZONE: The size of air fryer silicone pot is 20.5cm*13.5cm*7 cm. Especially suitable for 8.2L-9.5L Large Dual Air Fryer. Like Ninja Foodi Dual Zone AF451UK / AF400UK, Tower T17088 9L, Instant Pot Vortex Plus 8.5L XL Dual Air Fryer, Salter EK4548, EMtronics/Devology Dual Air Fryer and More

KEEP AIR FRYER CLEAN: Perfect air fryer silicone liner for ninja saves getting basket to greasey, and no residues. Keep sides & bottom of air fryer almost spotless. Compared to dual zone air fryer parchment paper liner, silicone liners is reusable, washable and resistant to high temperatures. And will not catch on fire like air fryer disposable paper liners. Reusable air fryer silicone liners is a must have air fryer dual accessories

PREMINUM MATERIAL & HEAT RESISTANCE: Our air fryer liners for Tower/Ninja Foodi Dual air fryer is made from 100% food-safe grade silicone. It is odorless, non-toxic, non-stick and highly heat resistant, withstanding temperatures up to 230℃/450°F

EASY TO USE & EASY TO CLEAN: Our silicone air fryer liner for dual basket is designed with handles on both sides to make transferring the food to plate easier. Our silicone rectangle air fryer liner is soft and flexible. And please place the silicone liners in warm soapy water immediately you remove food and after soaking, flipping the inside out, use brush to get off the stubborn bits. It's also dishwasher safe

WIDE USES: These dual air fryer liners can be used for baking or cooking various of food, such as chips, chicken, cakes, meat and more, perfect for home/outdoor cooking, baking, camping and party, etc
